points.title: Sigiriya Rock Fortress
points.description: Massive 200-meter high rock column with the ruins of King Kasyapa's 5th-century palace on top.

points.title: Sigiriya Frescoes
points.description: Exquisite 5th-century paintings of celestial maidens on a sheltered pocket of the rock face.

points.title: Lion Gate
points.description: Impressive entrance featuring enormous lion paws carved from rock - remnants of a full lion figure.

points.title: Mirror Wall
points.description: Polished wall that once reflected the king's image, now covered with ancient visitor graffiti.

points.title: Water Gardens
points.description: Sophisticated hydraulic system with fountains, pools, and channels that still function today.

points.title: Boulder Gardens
points.description: Natural rock formations with ancient pathways and meditation caves.

points.title: Pidurangala Rock
points.description: Ancient Buddhist monastery site offering the perfect vantage point for photographing Sigiriya, especially at sunrise and sunset.

points.title: Minneriya National Park
points.description: Home to "The Gathering" - Asia's largest meeting of wild elephants during dry season (June-September).

points.title: Kaudulla National Park
points.description: Diverse wildlife sanctuary with seasonal elephant gatherings, leopards, and over 160 bird species.
